_comment: Template for a childJob task. Calls another workflow as a sub-job. actor MUST be 'job', task MUST be empty string. The engine auto-sets task at runtime. Fill in incoming.workflow with the child workflow name. Set incoming.variables with data to pass. For looping, set incoming.data_array and incoming.loopType ('parallel' or 'sequential').
name: childJob
description: Runs another workflow as a child job
